name: Red Bull Ring

corners.name: Turn 1 (Castrol)
corners.notes: Heavy braking after S/F straight. Incident hotspot on lap 1.

corners.name: Turn 3 (Schlossgold)
corners.notes: Fast sweeping right over the crest uphill.

corners.name: Turn 5 (A1)
corners.notes: Tight hairpin, overtaking under braking. DRS zone follows.

corners.name: Turn 7 (Rauch)
corners.notes: Long hairpin. Heavy tyre wear section.

corners.name: Turn 9 (Rindt)
corners.notes: Tight hairpin named after Jochen Rindt. DRS activation on approach to T1.

_accuracy: corner names approximate — contribute corrections at github.com/racehooks/corner-map
